vocab.meaning: tin tốt lành, âm thanh khiến ai đó cực kỳ hạnh phúc
vocab.example: The gentle pitter-patter of rain after a long drought is absolute music to my ears.

vocab.meaning: gợi lại cảm xúc, tạo ra sự đồng cảm
vocab.example: The melancholic sound of the cello really strikes a chord with me whenever I feel pensive.

vocab.meaning: vang xa, rõ ràng, dễ nghe
vocab.example: I love the sound of church chimes in the morning; they are always as clear as a bell.

vocab.meaning: là một liều thuốc bổ (khiến ai đó thấy khỏe/vui hơn)
vocab.example: The rhythmic sound of ocean waves is a real tonic for my stress after a hectic work week.

vocab.meaning: làm cho tâm trí thư thái, bình an
vocab.example: The crackling of a wood fire has a unique way of setting my mind at ease during the winter.
I find that the distant chirping of birds at dawn can truly soothe my soul.

vocab.meaning: khơi gợi lại những ký ức
vocab.example: The sound of an old vinyl record player often reignites memories of my childhood spent at my grandparents' house.

vocab.word: get into the swing of things
vocab.meaning: bắt nhịp, trở nên hào hứng với điều gì đó
vocab.example: The upbeat tempo of jazz music helps me get into the swing of things when I start my morning workout.

vocab.meaning: làm ai đó thích thú/hứng thú
vocab.example: The intricate, crisp sound of a fountain pen scratching on paper really tickles my fancy.

vocab.meaning: mê mẩn, đắm chìm vào khoảnh khắc đó
vocab.example: Whenever I hear a live acoustic guitar performance, I tend to be completely lost in the moment.
